raw_consumer_statement:
In XXXX I was scammed into investing with a real estate/entrepreneur money making scheme called the XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX method. This company is known as XXXX XXXX and enticed individuals to open credit card accounts to pay for their educational services. On XX/XX/XXXX the Federal Trade Commission issued XXXX XXXX for XXXX XXXX and Monetary Judgement XXXX, IT IS ORDERED that the Corporate Defendants and Individual Defendants are permanently restrained and enjoined from advertising, marketing, distributing, promoting, offering for sale, or selling, or assisting in the advertising, marketing, distributing, promoting, offering for sale, or selling, of any Real Estate Coaching XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Coaching Program. The permanent injunction is attached. 

XXXX XXXX assisted and enticed me to open this account and charged me for their services which were deemed fraudulent by the Federal Trade Commission. I've attempted to contact to resolve this issue with XXXX Bank Delaware with no assistance from them. Countless hours have been spent trying to remediate the fraudulent charges but they do not agree. This has severely affected my XXXX XXXX. 

I request Barclays Bank Delaware dissolve all charges that were charged to me for services I never received from XXXX XXXX and were deemed fraudulent by the Federal Trade Commission. 

Barclays Bank Delaware previously made the statements in their initial responses that " You transferred a charge to this account " which is a false statement. The 3rd party financial assistance company made this transfer. The company XXXX XXXX was shut down by the Federal Trade Commission. 

In total I was charged approximately {$60000.00} spanning multiple credit cards which were opened by a 3rd party company and charged. In XXXX of XXXX I received a settlement check for approximately {$4500.00} which is nowhere near the amount I was charged. I'm requesting Barclays Bank Delaware to file a claim against XXXX XXXX and it's defendants through the Federal Trade Commission and dissolve me from these fraudulent charges and update the change to every credit reporting agency.
